'''Buzz-knucks''' were powered [[Melee weapon/Legends|melee weapons]]. They were used by [[Imperial Dungeoneer]]s.

{{Weapon-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
The buzz-knuck appeared in the [[2003]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]'', a [[Wikipedia:Massively multiplayer online role-playing game|massively multiplayer online roleplaying game]] developed by [[Sony]] Online Entertainment and published by [[LucasArts]],<ref name="SWG:BK" /> prior to its closure on [[December 15]], [[2011]].<ref name="Shutdown">{{SonyCite|url=playerinfo|text=IMPORTANT INFORMATION ABOUT ''STAR WARS'' GALAXIES™}}</ref> The buzz-knuck was a reward for being successful in the [[Wikipedia:Player versus player|player versus player]] "[[:w:c:swg:Battlefield|battlefields]]" introduced with the release of the "[[W:c:swg:Game Update 10|Game Update 10]],"<ref name="SWG:BK" /> on [[June 2]], [[2009]].<ref name="SonyForumsCite-Star Wars Galaxies: Game Update 10">{{SonyForumsCite|url=swg/posts/list.m?topic_id=927421|text=Star Wars Galaxies: Game Update 10}}</ref>
